bead.title: artifact regeneration: artifactRegenerate mutation + UI action + artifacts.spec.ts e2e
bead.description:
Add the artifactRegenerate mutation and wire up the Regenerate button in the provenance panel.

Backend:
- GraphQL mutation artifactRegenerate(artifactId: ID!): ArtifactRegenerateResult
- ArtifactRegenerateResult: { runId: ID!, status: String! }
- Resolver dispatches a server-side worker using the artifact's generator/prompt, returns the new run id.
- If no generator metadata, mutation returns a typed error (not a crash).

UI:
- Regenerate button in provenance panel (only shown when generated_by is present).
- On click: button shows spinner; calls mutation; on success shows returned run id and two links: 'View run' (/runs/:runId) and 'Refresh artifact' (reload artifact detail).
- On error: show error message inline in provenance panel; no silent failure.

E2E:
- artifacts.spec.ts: full US-081b workflow end-to-end using seeded fixture (artifact with known generated_by). Flow: list → filter → open → verify renderer → provenance panel → click Regenerate → verify run id shown → follow run link → navigate back to artifact.

Depends on ddx-43684ac1 (provenance panel), ddx-ccbf6172 (backend).
bead.acceptance:
1. artifactRegenerate mutation present in schema; resolver dispatches worker and returns run id.
2. Regenerate button only visible when generated_by is present.
3. Button spinner shows during mutation; success state shows run id with links.
4. Error case: mutation fails → inline error in panel, no page crash.
5. No generator metadata: mutation returns typed error, button remains disabled with tooltip.
6. artifacts.spec.ts passes: complete US-081b workflow from list to regeneration and back.
